title: Japan retail investors wait with near $100bn in funds in volatile market
summary:
Individuals ready to pour gains back into market dips in contrarian moves

The Nikkei Stock Average closed at a record 72,366 on last Friday. (Photo by Shun Kato)

TOKYO -- Japan's retail investors have a near-record of over 16 trillion yen ($99 billion) in brokerage accounts ready to invest in the ...

fullArticle:
Individuals ready to pour gains back into market dips in contrarian moves

The Nikkei Stock Average closed at a record 72,366 on last Friday. (Photo by Shun Kato)

TOKYO -- Japan's retail investors have a near-record of over 16 trillion yen ($99 billion) in brokerage accounts ready to invest in the country's  volatile stock market, providing a potential source of support against falling share prices....
